This guide is written in simple English.If you prefer to read this in your own language,copy this entire guide and paste it into ChatGPT.Then type: "Translate this into [your language]"and it will give you the full guide in your language.
මෙම මාර්ගෝපදේශය සරල ඉංග්‍රීසියෙන් ලියා ඇත.ඔබට ඔබේ භාෂාවෙන් කියවීමට අවශ්‍ය නම්,
මෙම සම්පූර්ණ මාර්ගෝපදේශය copy කර ChatGPT වෙත paste කරන්න.එවිට මෙසේ type කරන්න: "Translate this into Sinhala"එවිට ඔබට සිංහල භාෂාවෙන් සම්පූර්ණ මාර්ගෝපදේශය ලැබෙනු ඇත.
यह गाइड सरल अंग्रेजी में लिखी गई है।अगर आप इसे अपनी भाषा में पढ़ना चाहते हैं,तो इस पूरी गाइड को copy करके ChatGPT में paste करें।फिर टाइप करें: "Translate this into Hindi"और आपको पूरी गाइड हिंदी में मिल जाएगी।
هذا الدليل مكتوب باللغة الإنجليزية البسيطة.
إذا كنت تفضل قراءته بلغتك الخاصة،
انسخ هذا الدليل كاملاً والصقه في ChatGPT.
ثم اكتب: "Translate this into Arabic"
وستحصل على الدليل كاملاً باللغة العربية.
Complete Step-by-Step Workflow Guide
Phase 1 — Generate Your Prompts
Use Claude AI to generate all the prompts you need before going into Google Flow.
⚠ Tip: Keep the Claude chat open in a separate tab — you will copy each prompt directly from Claude as you go.
Phase 2 — Generate 13 Images (Google Flow)
You will generate 13 images one by one. Each image is used as the reference for the next one — this keeps the pot, soil, and plant consistent throughout all frames.
⚠ Important: Image Prompt 3 comes right after the hand scene (Image 2). The prompt already includes the instruction 'no hand visible in this frame.' Trust it — just use Image 2 as the reference as normal.
Phase 3 — Generate 12 Video Clips (Google Flow)
Each video clip is a smooth transition between two consecutive images. You will use the First Frame / Last Frame feature in Google Flow to create each clip.
Phase 4 — Edit and Export in CapCut
Now you have 12 video clips ready. Import them into CapCut and assemble the final timelapse.
⚠ Optional: Add a very low volume ambient background sound or keep it silent for a clean documentary feel.
Quick Reference — Full Workflow
